lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What did Joshua send two men to do?
answers: Spy out the land of Canaan, especially Jericho
Build a wall around Israel’s camp

questions.text: Where did the spies stay when they reached Jericho?
answers: In a tent outside the walls

questions.text: What did the king of Jericho do when he learned about the spies?
Where did Rahab hide the spies?
answers: In a pile of grain on her roof
In a hole in the ground

questions.text: What did Rahab tell the king’s men?
answers: She said the spies had left and sent the men in the wrong direction
She said she had never seen them
She invited them to come to dinner

questions.text: What did Rahab say about how the people of Jericho felt?
answers: They were afraid because they heard what the Lord had done for Israel
They had never heard of the Israelites

questions.text: What promise did Rahab ask the spies to make?
How did Rahab let the spies escape the city?
answers: She lowered them through a rope in the city wall
She hid them in a cart

questions.text: What did the spies tell Rahab to do to be saved when Israel returned?
answers: Tie a red rope in her window and keep her family inside the house
Hide in a pile of grain on the roof

questions.text: When they returned to Joshua, what did the spies report?
answers: We are sure the Lord will give us this land
The city is too strong to defeat
